S-01.notes: D1=-1 -> scrollable-with-save-bar with explicit save bar; D2=0 -> help text on non-obvious fields only; D3=0 -> one column with section groups. Inline validation rendered via wireframe-ds .wf-validation-error convention (no catalogue pattern for inline-validation; lives in DS conventions per _index.md).

S-02.notes: Registry D1=-1 prescribes table.comfortable; catalogue collections/table does not list a comfortable variant (variants are default | compact | selectable | expandable-row | editable | virtualised | sticky-header), so fell back to variants.default per step 4.1 fallback rule. Bulk-select disabled by default per D1=-1 careful posture (selectable variant not enabled). Per-row destructive actions (Cancel) wrapped in modal-confirmation per GR-04; modal rendered open as the confirming state preview.

S-03.notes: D3=0 -> detail-page.default at standard density. HasBulkErrorFile indicator surfaced as a danger-tone notification-banner with download CTA and drill-link to S-04.

S-04.notes: Registry D1=-1 prescribes table.comfortable; not present in catalogue's variants block, so fell back to variants.default (same fallback as S-02). Per-row validation errors use .wf-validation-error convention from the DS (no catalogue inline-validation pattern). Empty state rendered hidden as a sibling preview block.
